name: Plain
description: Plain is a modern customer support / helpdesk platform for product teams, offering inboxes, knowledge bases, integrations, AI assistants and extensibility.

auth_methods.note: The Help Center states that for API access and developer documentation you must contact sales or your account representative, indicating there are no publicly documented API auth methods.

credential_access.note: Help Center explicitly instructs to contact sales or your account representative for API access and developer documentation, which implies access is partner-gated rather than self-serve.

api_surface.note: The site and Help Center indicate Plain is API-first in product messaging, but developer documentation and API reference are not publicly available — you must contact sales/account rep to obtain API docs, so public API surface cannot be confirmed.

buildability.note: No public API docs or self-serve credential issuance found; API access requires contacting sales/account representative, preventing building without establishing a commercial relationship.

queries: Plain support helpdesk Plain.com developer API docs "Plain API" "plain.com"
